revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2025 April 23|Template:CoordDec|merge=Template:Coord}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#invoke:coordinates|coord|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{#invoke:String|join|_|{{#if:{{{dim|}}}|dim:{{{dim}}}}}|{{#if:{{{globe|}}}|globe:{{{globe}}}}}|{{#if:{{{scale|}}}|scale:{{{scale}}}}}|{{#if:{{{region|}}}|region:{{{region}}}}}|{{#if:{{{source|}}}|source:{{{source}}}}}|{{#if:{{{type|}}}|type:{{{type}}}}}}}| format={{{format|}}}| display={{{display|}}} | name={{{name|}}} }}<!--
-->{{#coordinates:{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|dim={{{dim|}}}|globe={{{globe|}}}|scale={{{scale|}}}|region={{{region|}}}|type={{{type|}}}
|{{#switch:{{{display|}}}
 |inline,title
 |inline, title
 |it
 |t
 |title,inline
 |title={{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}
  |doc
  |testcases=
  |#default={{talk other||primary}}
  }}
 |#default=
 }}
|name={{{name|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CoordDec here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CoordDec for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
